channel.title: EAB Paper-Trading Desk — Daily Digest
channel.description: Daily Fast Mover Watch paper-trading digests. Educational only. Not financial advice. No income, earnings, or performance guarantees.

item.title: Fast Mover Watch 2026-07-20 — Free Preview of 4 Pre-Market Momentum Signals (Paper Educational)
item.description: Paper-educational pre-market momentum digest for 2026-07-20: 4 disclosed movers (WAB, AWK, CSX, DUK). Illustrative levels, 10AM discipline. Not...
